title: ICAI CA Sep/Nov 2026 Exams: Application Correction Window Now Open!
content:
# ICAI CA Sep/Nov 2026 Exams: Application Correction Window Now Open!

Ek important update hai for all CA aspirants! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne September and November 2026 CA examinations ke liye application correction window announce kar diya hai. This is a crucial opportunity for candidates to rectify any errors in their previously submitted examination forms.

Here are the key details you need to know:

*   **Correction Window Open Date:** July 23, 2026
*   **Correction Window Close Date:** July 25, 2026
*   **Where to Make Corrections:** Candidates can make the necessary changes online through the ICAI Self Service Portal (SSP).
*   **Editable Details:** You can amend details such as your exam city/centre, medium of examination, and other permitted changes like group selection or paper exemption.
*   **Non-Editable Details:** Please note, critical information like your name, date of birth, registration number, and exam level (Intermediate or Final) generally cannot be changed during this window.

Candidates are advised to review their forms carefully and utilize this short window to ensure all details are accurate to avoid any issues later.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit ICAI's Official Website for Updates](https://www.icai.org/)

*Published on: 24 July 2026*
